resources.string: Please select a root directory first.
Failed to open externally: no compatible app was found.
This ZIP type cannot be reopened from Recent yet.
Filter file names with regex. Leave empty to show all.
Added %1$d track(s) to “%2$s”, skipped %3$d duplicate(s), and started playback
Added %1$d track(s) to “%2$s” and started playback
The selected audio already exists in “%1$s”. Playback started directly.
This playlist has no bookmarks yet.
The current playback is not a playlist.
Select a playlist to start playback.
No playlists yet. Select MP3/OGG items in the pending list and tap Add to Playback.
Choose where to add %1$d audio track(s).
Loading metadata for the selected filter field…
No tracks match the current filter
Directory playlists are refreshed from the source folder first, then reordered.
Start each track at a fixed position with an optional max duration; resume progress is not saved
m:ss or seconds; each track starts here
From start position; empty or 0 plays to track end
Invalid time format; use seconds or m:ss / h:mm:ss
For example: chorus start / key passage
No bookmarks have been saved yet.
Add all filtered results to the pending list
Added %1$d item(s) to the pending list
A file pick is already in progress. Finish or cancel it first.
Finish or cancel file selection first
Double-tap a matching file to select; tap a folder to open
Double-tap a file or folder to select; tap a folder to open
Directories cannot be selected; double-tap a matching file. Tap a folder to open it.
No matching files in this folder
This item does not match the pick rules
You can select at most %1$d items
Picked %1$d attachment(s); upload not implemented yet
When enabled, startup asks for the private-key password to unlock it. After a successful unlock, the key stays cached in memory and later key operations will not ask again. This is not exported.
Shared with FTP as the admin role. Manage all boards and FTP remotely. Leave empty for no password. User roles are managed in the Family Network tab.
Used by the FTP and Family Network pages. 0 means it will not exit automatically.
%1$s; local board service %2$s; page timeout %3$d min
When off, this device is not advertised and cannot be connected, but you can still browse other devices. Local boards can only be managed in this app.
Author name on messages; leave empty to use the host name.
Used for LAN broadcast and the device list; leave empty to use the system device name or model.
Create separate passwords for friends, colleagues, etc. Assign roles when creating boards.
Role ID and password are required
If none are selected, only admin can access this board.
Add user roles under Manage user roles first.
Admin always has access to all boards.
Registration: active and discoverable from PC
No bulletin board service has been discovered yet. After the local service starts, you should see a Self entry in the list; you can also tap Refresh in the top bar.
Local boards can only be managed in this app. Remote devices connecting here can browse and post only.
This board is empty. Post a message to try it out.
Enter this device\'s access password (user or admin; not the passwords configured on your own device).
No devices found. Wait or tap Refresh; to forward locally, enable the local bulletin board service in settings.
No other devices on the LAN. Enable the local bulletin board service in settings to forward to this device.
The pack name \"%1$s\" conflicts with an existing board. Choose a new name.
Delete board \"%1$s\"? All messages and attachments will be removed.
At least one board must remain.
Double-tap a .boardpack file to select; tap a folder to open. Packs are usually under the bulletin export folder.
No .boardpack archive files in this folder
Select a root directory in settings before picking an archive pack from local storage.
This clears all saved device access passwords. You will need to enter them again next time. Continue?
Local access password: set (required for external devices)
Local access password: not set (open access)
Local bulletin board service is disabled
Messages are kept in memory only and will be cleared when this page closes.
No messages yet. Send one, or have the remote service send one to this device.
Type a debug message for this service
Configuration exported to the root directory.
Requested creation of the player shortcut.
Failed to create the player shortcut: %1$s
Requested creation of the notes shortcut.
Failed to create the notes shortcut: %1$s
You can switch directly to a recently used directory without clearing the current trash:
Unsupported system version: pinned shortcuts require Android 8.0 or later.
ShortcutManager is unavailable. Failed to create the shortcut.
The current launcher does not support pinned shortcuts.
Pinned shortcuts are not supported for this page: %1$s
The launcher rejected the shortcut request. Please confirm launcher support and try again.
No dictionary is available. Import a StarDict package from the file list first (.zip or .ifo).
Enter a regex pattern and tap Search.
Default secret key not found. Generate a key pair first.
The key password is missing, so the encrypted note cannot be read.
Decryption failed. Check the key password.
Unable to read the quick note file.
Unable to create or locate the quick note file.
Default key not found. Generate a key pair first.
Failed to encrypt the quick note.
Failed to save the quick note.
No records yet. Tap the top-right button to add one.
Some text in the “%1$s” section does not match the current record protocol. It will not be loaded as records and will be overwritten when you leave this feature. Copy it first if you need to keep it.
Move all records under “%1$s” to a new category at once. Leave empty to make them uncategorized.
Convert directly between plain text and ciphertext, with compact headerless ciphertext by default
Encryption now outputs compact Base64 ciphertext for the default key, without BEGIN/Version headers. Decryption accepts both this compact format and older armored PGP text.
The clipboard does not contain usable text.
There is no output to copy.
There is no plain text to copy.
The default secret key was not found. Generate the default key pair first.
The default key was not found.
The public key matching the default secret key was not found.
The key password is missing, so the default-key ciphertext cannot be decrypted.
This ciphertext was created with symmetric encryption, not with the default key.
The ciphertext format is invalid. Paste compact Base64 ciphertext or older armored PGP text.
Encrypted with the default key. You can copy and send it now.
Decryption failed: the key password is incorrect, or this ciphertext was not encrypted for the current default secret key.
The cached key password failed. Enter the key password again.
The ciphertext box already has content. Continuing will overwrite the existing ciphertext. Continue?
The plain text box already has content. Continuing will overwrite the existing plain text. Continue?
Keep screen on is enabled. Leaving this page will close the current network service page.
Tap to open the debug conversation
Username is lm. Set the password in configuration (blank means no password). Enter the following in a file manager on your PC or phone:
Or use lftp, FileZilla, curl, etc.:
Startup failed: root directory is unavailable (please use a document-tree root).
FTP server started. Port=%1$d, listening on 0.0.0.0
Using the root directory as the initial working directory (parse error: %1$s)
A repository URL and a selected root directory are required.
Enter a valid HTTPS repository URL, for example https://gitcode.com/user/repo.git
The root directory must be a document-tree root (must contain /tree/).
Downloaded to %1$s under the root directory
Synchronization succeeded, but writing to .sysgit failed.
Local repository does not exist. Synchronize first.
Synchronizing from .sysgit to the local cache...
Failed to synchronize from the document tree to local storage.
Clone/sync to .sysgit under the root directory. HTTPS only.
Saved or pending save; not applied yet
Delete the local .sysgit directory and cache?\nThis can resolve local conflicts, but you will need to synchronize again.
No system Git base configuration is set. Provide a base repository URL such as https://host/user/repo.git before creating a new Git project.

Base repository: %1$s\nNew projects support project or user/project paths. The local directory always matches the project path. Creation fails if the same path already exists under the root directory.
No managed Git projects yet. Tap \"New Git\" to sync a remote repository into a same-named folder under the root directory.
Not recorded (repository default branch will be used)
The dialog closes immediately after you create the project, and download progress appears in the log area. Project paths support project or user/project; the local directory matches the project path.
Remove management record for Git \"%1$s\"? This does not delete /%2$s under the current root directory or the remote repository.
Git: %1$s\nSwitching branches immediately re-downloads that branch and overwrites /%2$s under the root directory. Switching is rejected if the local directory has uncommitted changes.
No branches available to switch to
Deriving repository URL from base repository…
Unable to derive project URL from base repository
A Git project with the same name already exists
This project is already in the managed list: %1$s
A directory with the same name already exists under the root: /%1$s. Creation stopped to avoid overwriting it.
No system Git base repository is configured, so creation is unavailable
Invalid project name: use project or user/project; segments cannot be empty and cannot contain \\, ., or ..
This Git project is already in the management list
A directory with the same name already exists under the root
Dictionary data file does not exist: %1$s
Entry data exceeds file range: offset=%1$d, size=%2$d, fileSize=%3$d
No .ifo file was found in the archive.
The archive is missing the .idx/.dict dictionary files.
Unable to obtain the .ifo file name.
Unable to locate the directory containing the .ifo file.
%1$s.idx was not found in the same directory.
%1$s.dict was not found in the same directory.
Unable to obtain the file name.
Unable to read the source file.
Failed to save the public key: %1$s
ContentResolver.query returned null. The URI may be invalid or access may be missing.
moveToTrash: failed to create trash directory
moveToTrash: cannot move the trash directory into itself
moveToTrash: failed to copy child item %1$s
moveToTrash: copy succeeded but deleting the source directory failed
moveToTrash: copy succeeded but deleting the source failed, rollback applied
[copy-dir] %1$s child count=0 (listFiles empty and tree query returned nothing)
[move-dir] %1$s copy succeeded but deleting source failed
All non-encrypted extracted browsing caches, including .md.zip/.rst.zip/.html.zip/.pic.zip and .epub/.txt/.llm/.llm.zip.
All encrypted browsing caches that may be kept after exit, including .md.zip/.rst.zip/.html.zip/.pic.zip/.epub/.llm.zip; they may contain sensitive plaintext content.
Other cache files or abnormal leftovers not included in the first two categories.
Saving reading progress: %1$s chapter %2$d, ratio %3$s, URI hash=%4$s, file=%5$s
Loading reading progress: URI hash=%1$s, file=%2$s, exists=%3$s
Cleared leftover encrypted-file bookmarks from persistent storage: uri=%1$s, count=%2$d
Cleared leftover encrypted-file progress from persistent storage: uri=%1$s
Failed to clear leftover encrypted reading data from persistent storage
Temporary file is empty or missing, path: %1$s
Temporary file is empty or missing
The HTML.zip file is encrypted. Enter the password.
index.html or README.html was not found in the extracted directory Directory listing: %1$s
This app has not been rigorously tested. Use it at your own risk. The author is not responsible for any data loss.
Some text in the “%1$s” section does not match the current format. It will not be loaded as notes and will be overwritten on save. Copy it first if you need to keep it.
No notes for this book yet. Tap the button below to add one for the current chapter.
Import \"%1$s\" into the local public key store?
Delete remote public key \"%1$s\"?\nIt will be committed and pushed automatically.
\"%1$s\" already exists in the remote public key store.
Export \"%1$s\" to .sysgit/pubkey/?\nIt will be committed and pushed automatically.
Tap Refresh in the top-right corner to load shared files
\"%1$s\" already exists in the root directory. Overwrite it?
Delete \"%1$s\"?\nIt will be committed and pushed automatically.
Search only in text edit mode. Matches are selected directly in the editor.
Enter a regex and tap Find.
"Bulletin attachments/%1$s" already exists. How should it be handled?
Double-tap a file or folder to select; tap a folder to open it
No root directory is set, so attachments cannot be selected.
Keep at least one of notes, quote, or location.
Decryption failed. Check the key password.
No book notes yet. Tap the button at the bottom right to add one.
No book notes match the filter.
Enter book title, chapter, quote, or notes
Default key not found. Generate a key pair first.
Default secret key not found. Generate a key pair first.
Key password is missing, so book notes cannot be read.
Unable to read the book notes file.
Unable to create or locate the book notes file.
When enabled, playback continues in the next chapter after the current one finishes, if one exists.
Engine: %1$s; voice: %2$s; speed: %3$d%%; auto next chapter: %4$s
Not set; will be chosen automatically
File already exists: %1$s. Delete the old file or choose another name before exporting.
Invalid file name: it cannot be empty and cannot contain / or \.
Select at least one export category.
This file contains the following configuration categories. Choose what to import:
Select at least one import category.
Applies to EPUB/PDF readers. When enabled, the draggable next-chapter/page button is hidden.
No usable offline read-aloud engine was found. Install an offline TTS service on the system first.
The selected engine does not support book language %1$s and cannot fall back to the system default language.
Checking installed read-aloud engines for offline support…
The current chapter has no readable text.
Preparing read-aloud content for the current chapter…
Failed to start read-aloud. Error code: %1$d
Failed to start read-aloud. Engine: %1$s; voice: %2$s; language: %3$s; detail: %4$s. The voice may still require network access or extra authorization.
The current read-aloud engine has no selectable offline voices.
Loading offline voices for the current engine…
Only HTTP/HTTPS is supported. If no scheme is provided, https:// is added automatically.
Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS address with a host name, for example https://example.com/path
Encrypted with the recipient public key. You can copy and send it directly. Target key ID: %1$s
Selected recipient public key not found. Choose again.
The current page has no readable text.
Preparing read-aloud content for the current page…
Save failed: unable to read image
No viewable image files in this directory
Unable to locate current image in directory: %1$s
Quick notes are still processing, try again later
RAR5 extraction is not supported; convert to ZIP or RAR4
No readable .txt/.llm file found or extraction failed
Unable to parse LLM conversation file
Import failed: unable to parse JSON
Import failed: unable to read file
Import failed: no recognizable config categories in file
Saved external app unavailable; reverted to default opener
No app available to open this
No playable music files in this directory
Generated playlist from directory and started playback
Dictionary imported: %1$s (%2$d entries); removed oldest dictionary: %3$s
No files to obfuscate (do not select .qx files or folders)
No files to deobfuscate (select .qx files only)
List contains .gpg files; batch encryption is not supported
List contains non-.gpg files; batch decryption is not supported
No regular playlist to add to. Directory playlists cannot be targets; create a regular playlist first.
This directory has no trash; items will be deleted permanently.
Import contains %1$d playlists. Replace current playlists or append?
Import contains public/private keys and will overwrite local keys. Choose:
Share "%1$s" to .sysgit/share/? It will sync, copy, and push automatically.
Encrypt %1$s with the default public key as %2$s.pass; the original file will be deleted.
Default secret key not found; cannot decrypt. Generate a key pair first.
Root trash is not empty. Empty it before changing?
Processing %1$d items. Confirm the pending list to avoid mistakes:
%1$s already exists in this directory. Overwrite?
Regex to filter file names; leave blank for all
Search recursively from the current directory; blank means no limit.
Select a root directory to browse files
Switch directly to a recently used directory (current trash is kept):
Error: configure the Git repository first
Error: failed to copy to share directory
Default key not found; generate a key pair first
Extraction failed (check password or file content)
This archive is encrypted; enter the password.
Enter private key password to unlock the app
File opened from another app; select save location
No new files to add to pending list
Directory playlist · deleting tracks also deletes source files
Directory playlist · refreshes from source on reorder · deleting tracks also deletes source files
No regular playlist to move to. Directory playlists cannot be targets; create a regular playlist first.
, duplicate track already in target list
No playable audio files in current list
Generate music list for current directory
Uses Android Equalizer/BassBoost/LoudnessEnhancer; affects this player only.
On ExoPlayer, enables audio offload preference and larger buffers; true lossless output depends on the device.
Requests PARTIAL_WAKE_LOCK during playback to reduce stutter after screen off.
Engine switch takes effect on next track or restart.
These settings are stored locally to compare playback across devices.
Delete extracted cache? If not, you will need the password next time but can reuse cache and reading progress.
Invalid size range: minimum cannot exceed maximum
Invalid date range: start cannot be after end
Password (public-key files will try private key automatically)
Compress %1$d pending items into one ZIP file in the current directory.
Compress %1$d pending items into one 7Z file in the current directory.
Directory playlists cannot be move targets
Or select a public key for asymmetric encryption
Random tip (updates each time you open this)
Keep one secret key; multiple public keys allowed. Generate or import key pairs.
The current secret key will be deleted permanently. Files encrypted with it may become unreadable. Type yes to confirm.
All public keys will be deleted permanently. Encryption/verification that depends on them may fail. Type yes to confirm.
This public key will be deleted permanently. Related encryption/verification may fail. Type yes to confirm.
Key protection password (leave blank for none)
Existing keys detected. Continuing may overwrite the default key pair and make older encrypted files unreadable.
I understand the risk and agree to continue
Match %1$d / %2$d; navigation avoids the bottom find bar.
Enter text to search across all chapters.
Copy the link or open it in a browser.
This HTML viewer only supports following HTML/HTM links
Chapter file missing: index=%1$d href=%2$s file=%3$s

string-array.name: about_usage_tips
string-array.item: You can sync a Git repository locally at any time; many sharing features rely on it.
The built-in viewer supports text and binary viewing, plus text and binary editing.
Use the Markdown renderer to view .md or .rst files directly.
When another app opens a file with this app, you can save it to the app\'s root directory.
Double-tap a file to add it to the pending list for batch operations.
Obfuscation is fast but not cryptographically strong; it only encrypts file headers for temporary use on large files.
Enable "Show filters" in settings to filter file names with regex and add all matches to the pending list.
The FTP feature starts a server and keeps the device awake—exit manually or set an auto-timeout.
FTP transfers are insecure even with a password; do not use on untrusted networks.

resources.string: No index%1$s or README%1$s found in the archive, and no other %1$s files to build an index.
No index.html, README.html, or other .html file found in the archive.
Enter chapter number, title, or file name
Tap "Add bookmark at current position" below to create a positioned reading note.
Tap "Add bookmark at current position" below to create a positioned note.
Quote (uses current selection first, otherwise the current paragraph; long text is truncated)
This position is already bookmarked; switched to edit
Jump within the current chapter only, using in-chapter progress % as an approximate position.
Reached the last page of this chapter
This reading note has no jump target
Select text and copy to clipboard to look up
Note: PDF pages are rendered as images; text selection is not supported yet. Use a dedicated PDF reader if you need to select text.
Remote clients cannot modify or delete; use the app on the host device.
Family network is not running. Start it first.
Downloaded attachment chunk is empty: offset=%1$d
Only the host can rename bulletin boards
Directory attachment is missing files list
Only the host can delete messages.
A valid network service password is required
Pack is missing board/meta.json or the name is invalid
mDNS service unregister failed, error=%1$d, service=%2$s
Local bulletin board service is disabled
Source directory attachment is missing file: %1$s
Failed to clean up incomplete attachment: %1$s
Service discovery has not fully stopped; retrying shortly…
Target service is missing a TLS fingerprint; cannot establish HTTPS securely.
Only the host can delete bulletin boards
Service offline notice: %1$s. To avoid Android NSD false positives, the last successfully resolved entry is kept for now.
Only the host can create bulletin boards
NsdManager is unavailable; cannot start service discovery.
Failed to stop service discovery, type=%1$s, error=%2$d
Only the host can rename bulletin boards.
Local bulletin board HTTPS service stopped.
Local bulletin board service is disabled; discovering other devices on the LAN only.
Failed to start service discovery, type=%1$s, error=%2$d
Failed to edit message: content cannot be empty.
Unable to parse local TLS private key; tried algorithms %1$s: %2$s
Message does not exist or content is empty
Failed to write attachment chunk: index=%1$d
Discovery listener not found while stopping: %1$s
Peer %1$s is missing a TLS fingerprint.
Attachment does not exist or is not ready
Failed to write directory attachment chunk: %1$s#%2$d
HTTP request headers too large (over 64 KiB)
Local HTTPS bulletin board listening on port %1$d, certificate fingerprint=%2$s.
Invalid message or attachment not ready
Imported bulletin board from archive pack: %1$s
Failed to resolve service, name=%1$s, error=%2$d
NsdManager is unavailable; cannot register or discover via mDNS.
mDNS service registration failed, error=%1$d, service=%2$s
Request body is not valid JSON
Only the host can delete bulletin boards.
Only the host can create bulletin boards.
Failed to listen on port %1$d: %2$s; using a system-assigned port instead.
Only the host can edit messages.
Service listener not found while unregistering: %1$s
Attachment upload incomplete or verification failed
Message does not exist or content is empty
Upload failed: no file or directory selected.
Local bulletin board service added to discovery list: %1$s (%2$s:%3$d)
Failed to send message: content and attachments cannot both be empty.
Local bulletin board service is disabled; cannot forward to this device
Failed to read bulletin board list
Unable to generate non-conflicting file name: %1$s
Bulletin board name cannot be empty
Local bulletin board service is disabled in settings; cannot open local board.
Message content cannot be empty or bulletin board does not exist
All selected files/directories are empty; cannot build directory attachment
Unsupported pack version: %1$d; only v%2$d is supported
Single-file attachment requires name and size
Directory attachment requires name and entries
Rename failed: name cannot be empty.
Rename failed: bulletin board does not exist
Download failed: root directory is not set.
Delete failed: bulletin board not found, or it is the last board
Failed to create bulletin board: name cannot be empty.
Delete the extracted cache from this session? If you keep it, you will still need the password next time, but existing cache can be reused.
Base repository URL or project name is empty; cannot derive project repository URL.
Base repository URL is not a valid HTTPS Git URL: %1$s
Base repository URL does not have enough path segments to identify user/project: %1$s
Project name is empty; cannot derive project repository URL.
Branch not found in remote repository: %1$s. Available branches: %2$s
Local cache repository does not exist: %1$s
Managed project directory not found under root: %1$s
Syncing from root %1$s to local cache...
Root directory, repository URL, or local directory name is empty; cannot sync managed project.
Project path is empty; cannot sync managed project.
Could not write root %1$s back to local cache first; sync stopped to avoid overwriting local changes.
Root %1$s has uncommitted local changes. Commit and push first, then download/sync to avoid overwriting local content.
Remote project fetched successfully, but writing to root %1$s failed.
Local cache repository does not exist. Download/sync first before switching branches.
No branches available to switch to.
Root directory, repository URL, or local directory name is empty; cannot commit managed project.
Local cache repository does not exist. Download/sync first: %1$s
Could not sync root %1$s back to local cache; commit stopped.
No changes to commit under root %1$s
No changes to push under root %1$s
Committed and pushed changes under root %1$s
.index line %1$d format error: quoted chapter path is missing closing quote.
.index line %1$d is not a supported chapter file: %2$s; only .txt or .llm is supported.
.index line %1$d points to a missing chapter file: %2$s; search roots=%3$s
Found .index file but it contains no usable chapter entries: %1$s

The target is a public IP while this device is on a private LAN. It may have resolved to a cellular address of the peer device. Please connect both devices to the same Wi-Fi and disable mobile data on the peer, then retry.
The target is not in the same subnet as this device. Please ensure both devices are on the same Wi-Fi.
Please verify the peer service is online and port %1$d is reachable.
No same-subnet target address was found. Connection attempt has been skipped (local=%1$s, attempted=%2$s, recognized=%3$s).
Network connection failed: %1$s (local=%2$s, remote=%3$s, attempted=%4$s, recognized=%5$s). %6$s
